assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly recommends autoscaled blue-green for L4 inference pool and a coordinated approach with timing considerations for A100 mixed pool, treating them as separate strategies

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green upgrade strategy instead of surge upgrade with maxSurge parameters

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response includes a dedicated 'Driver Compatibility Validation' section that mentions testing CUDA driver versions and compatibility with inference workloads in staging

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'Time upgrade during fine-tuning gaps' and provides maintenance exclusion commands to avoid interrupting 4-8 hour fine-tuning jobs

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'GPU VMs don't support live migration — every upgrade requires pod restart' and mentions the impact on inference latency

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes PDB configuration in the pre-upgrade checklist: 'PDBs configured: minAvailable: 1 per inference deployment'

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not specifically address the issue of auto-scaler creating nodes at the old version during the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed staging validation commands and emphasizes testing CUDA driver versions and inference workload compatibility before production upgrade
